title: Psyllophora obtusata
taxonomy: Psyllophora obtusata is classified within the phylum Mollusca, specifically within the class Gastropoda. It belongs to the family Nudibranchia, which comprises of marine slugs without shells. This species is further categorized into the subfamily Polyceratinae. The subfamily Polyceratinae is characterized by its unique body shape and coloration. Psyllophora obtusata is also known to be a species of nudibranch that is found in tropical waters.
